tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name IN ('github_pull_requests', 'linear_issues') ORDER BY table_name, column_name"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT pr.number AS pr_number, pr.closes_linear AS linear_issue_id, li.state AS linear_state
FROM github_pull_requests pr
JOIN linear_issues li ON li.id = pr.closes_linear
WHERE pr.state = 'merged'
  AND li.state <> 'done'
ORDER BY pr.number"}
